docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-06-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER KETTERING, SHERRY HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER KETTERING, SHERRY RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT JIMERSON, CHERYL $136,534.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $136,534.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER KETTERING, SHERRY AS TO RESPONDENT JIMERSON, CHERYL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SHERRY KETTERING'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER SHERRY KETTERING'S MOTION For Order Confirming Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
